title: gh-126594: Fix typeobject.c wrap_buffer() cast
author: vstinner
body:
Reject flags smaller than INT_MIN.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: @JelleZijlstra: Do you want to review this change?

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> Do you think it's worth adding a test? I understand this condition can perhaps only be triggered on some platforms.

Sure, I added a test.
